params.name: Dream Top
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Time Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On May 24, 2005, this top was used to tell reality and dreams apart, and it has begun spinning. After many years of research, the dream maker discovered that if the top keeps spinning, it means that someone is still in the dream. If it falls, it means that it is back in reality. He spins the top once to help his clients enter the dream and spins it again to bring them back to reality. [Size] Small: about 4 to 5 cm in diameter
Medium: weighs about 15 to 30 kg
Large: weighs more than 31 k …
